name: ½-Orc, ¾-Wizard, ⅞-Confident
text:
Prowess, but only on Tuesdays. (If it is not Tuesday, you must lie convincingly about what day it is.)
When ½-Orc enters the battlefield, open any Sticker Sheet and put one sticker on a permanent. That permanent's name becomes the sticker.
{½}, Balance this card on your head: Copy target instant or sorcery spell. If the card falls before the spell resolves, copy it a second time, purely out of spite.
